title: justicia calcarata
intro: Justicia calcarata, also known as the "Hooked Calcarata," is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Justicia calcarata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
